原文:

CodersNews

Posted on Feb 11


Ionic is a popular open-source framework for building cross-platform mobile applications using web technologies such as HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. It was introduced in 2013 and since then, it has been widely used by developers to create high-quality mobile applications that run on both Android and iOS platforms.

Overall, Ionic is a versatile and powerful framework for building cross-platform mobile applications. It allows developers to use web technologies they are already familiar with to create high-quality mobile apps quickly and efficiently.

Ionic is a fantastic option for your next project, regardless of if you are an experienced developer or are just getting started with mobile app development.

One of the key strengths of them is their ability to understand the unique requirements of each client and deliver customized mobile app solutions that meet their specific needs.

Whether you are looking to build a new Ionic mobile app or enhance an existing one, They are the ideal partner to help you achieve your goals.

Items.Title: 连接到 GitHub 和获取搜索结果的 Python 脚本 | A Python Script to connect to GitHub and Fetches Search Results
Items.Description:
阿吉特·辛格·雷纳

发表于 2 月 11 日

它允许开发人员以编程方式访问平台的各个方面，例如管理存储库、管理用户和管理问题。

可以使用个人访问令牌、OAuth2 或基本身份验证来完成身份验证。 此外，还有许多以不同编程语言提供的客户端库，这使得与 API 的集成变得更加容易，并减少了您需要编写的代码量。

以下是从 GitHub 获取搜索结果的示例 Python 脚本。 请注意，您将需要个人帐户令牌才能使其正常工作：

 import requests import json url = "https://api.github.com/search/repositories?q=docker+desktop+extension&sort=stars&order=desc" headers = { "Authorization": "github_pat_XXXX" } response = requests.get(url, headers=headers) if response.status_code == 200: data = json.loads(response.text) for repository in data["items"]: print(f"{repository['name']}: {repository['html_url']}") else: print("Could not retrieve data from GitHub.")

在此脚本中，您需要替换为实际的 GitHub 个人访问令牌。 令牌作为授权标头在请求标头中传递。 这允许脚本访问您的 GitHub 帐户中受保护的资源，例如搜索存储库。

获取每个存储库的链接并将其与存储库名称一起添加到输出中，以冒号 (:) 分隔。

原文:

Ajeet Singh Raina

Posted on Feb 11

The GitHub API is a RESTful API for interacting with the GitHub platform. It allows developers to programmatically access various aspects of the platform, such as managing repositories, managing users, and managing issues.

The API supports a variety of methods for creating, retrieving, updating, and deleting resources, making it a powerful tool for automating various tasks and integrating with other systems. The API requires authentication for all methods except for those that are publicly accessible. The authentication can be done using a personal access token, OAuth2, or with basic authentication. GitHub provides extensive documentation for its API, making it easy to get started and use.

Additionally, there are many client libraries available in different programming languages, which makes it easier to integrate with the API and reduces the amount of code you need to write.

Here is a sample Python script that fetches search results from GitHub. Please note that you will require Personal Account Token to get it working:

import requests
import json

url = "https://api.github.com/search/repositories?q=docker+desktop+extension&sort=stars&order=desc"

headers = {
    "Authorization": "github_pat_XXXX"
}

response = requests.get(url, headers=headers)

if response.status_code == 200:
    data = json.loads(response.text)
    for repository in data["items"]:
        print(f"{repository['name']}: {repository['html_url']}")
else:
    print("Could not retrieve data from GitHub.")

In this script, you'll need to replace with your actual GitHub personal access token. The token is passed in the request headers as an Authorization header. This allows the script to access protected resources in your GitHub account, such as searching for repositories.

The link to each repository is fetched and added to the output along with the repository name, separated by a colon (:).

Items.Title: Excel 迷你图 | Excel Sparklines
Items.Description:

  2. 运行命令：PM> Scaffold-DbContext name=StudentDbConnectionString TrustServerCertificate=true;" Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.SqlServer -OutputDir Models
  3. 它生成了相关的 DbContext 文件（附截图）
  4. 在program.cs中的Builder.Services中手动注册DbContext...

In my case (VS2022, .NET 6) I also encountered the same problem n got solution in following way;

  1. Added Connection String in appsettings.json file (Screenshot attached)
  2. Ran the command: PM> Scaffold-DbContext name=StudentDbConnectionString TrustServerCertificate=true;" Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.SqlServer -OutputDir Models
  3. It generated relevant DbContext file (Screenshot attached)
  4. Manually registered DbContext in Builder.Services in program.cs…
